# Mantri Aroha Clinic

> Consultation and family care by Dr Mantri Vijaya Bhaskar — Asthma, COPD, chronic cough, allergy and preventive lung health.

Mantri Aroha Clinic offers evidence-based respiratory and family medicine. Services include online consultations, in-clinic visits, and pulmonary function testing. The Lung Health Library provides patient education on common respiratory conditions.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services, doctor profile, and contact details.
